title: A Lesson in Efficiency and Behavior
article_text: I had been studying for the exam, but I had not impressed my teacher. My vice was that I regularly behaved in a loud way. Similarly, my friend's jacket had a dirty stain from an infection. The broadcast said that the giant web of data had a new dimension of statistics. If I had logged my study time, I would have improved my efficiency. The membership to the resort required an iron will to stay calm. After the subsequent lesson, I bought bread at the entrance. The radical idea of using a clean jacket helped me avoid another infection. I wish I had known the depth of the problem before the exam. My father said that the dirty jacket had been thrown away.

sentences.en: I had been studying for the exam, but I had not impressed my teacher.
sentences.zh: 我一直在为考试学习，但我没有给老师留下深刻印象。

words.eng_def: a test of knowledge or skill
to cause someone to feel admiration

sentences.en: My vice was that I regularly behaved in a loud way.
sentences.zh: 我的缺点是，我经常以大声的方式表现。

words.eng_def: a bad habit or moral weakness
to act in a particular way

sentences.en: Similarly, my friend's jacket had a dirty stain from an infection.
sentences.zh: 同样地，我朋友的夹克上有一块来自感染的脏污渍。

words.eng_def: a disease caused by germs entering the body

sentences.en: The broadcast said that the giant web of data had a new dimension of statistics.
sentences.zh: 广播说，巨大的数据网有了一个新的统计维度。

words.eng_def: a network of threads or connections
a part or feature of something
a number that shows a fact or piece of information

sentences.en: If I had logged my study time, I would have improved my efficiency.
sentences.zh: 如果我记录了我的学习时间，我本可以提高我的效率。

words.eng_def: the quality of doing things without wasting time or energy

sentences.en: The membership to the resort required an iron will to stay calm.
sentences.zh: 度假村的会员资格需要钢铁般的意志才能保持冷静。

words.eng_def: the state of being a member of a group
a place where people go for vacation
a strong metal; also a tool for smoothing clothes

sentences.en: After the subsequent lesson, I bought bread at the entrance.
sentences.zh: 在接下来的课程之后，我在入口处买了面包。

words.eng_def: a food made from flour, water, and yeast
a door or way into a place

sentences.en: The radical idea of using a clean jacket helped me avoid another infection.
sentences.zh: 使用干净夹克的激进想法帮助我避免了另一次感染。

words.eng_def: extreme or very different from usual
a disease caused by germs entering the body

sentences.en: I wish I had known the depth of the problem before the exam.
sentences.zh: 我希望我在考试前就知道了问题的深度。

words.eng_def: a test of knowledge or skill

sentences.en: My father said that the dirty jacket had been thrown away.
sentences.zh: 我父亲说，那件脏夹克已经被扔掉了。

quiz.question_cn: “If I had logged my study time, I would have improved my efficiency.”中“efficiency”是什么意思？
quiz.question_en: In 'If I had logged my study time, I would have improved my efficiency,' what does 'efficiency' mean?
What is the closest meaning of 'broadcast'?

quiz.question_cn: “The radical idea of using a clean jacket helped me avoid another infection.”中“radical”是什么意思？
quiz.question_en: In 'The radical idea of using a clean jacket helped me avoid another infection,' what does 'radical' mean?
What is the closest meaning of 'subsequent'?

image_prompts: A student sitting at a desk with books, looking disappointed while a teacher stands nearby.
A person talking loudly in a classroom, with others covering their ears.
A jacket with a dark stain on it, lying on a chair.
A TV screen showing a news broadcast with a giant network of lines and numbers.
A person writing in a logbook next to a clock, with a graph showing improvement.
A fancy resort entrance with a sign that says 'Membership Required' and a person looking determined.
A person buying bread from a stand near the entrance of a building.
A person holding a clean jacket, with a germ symbol crossed out nearby.
A student looking worried before an exam, with a deep hole symbolizing the depth of the problem.
A father pointing to a trash can where a dirty jacket is being thrown away.
